---
title: "Opportunity"
description-meta: "Student research opportunities and research supervision by Sivalingam S M."
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.academic-opportunity}

::: {.opportunity-header}

<!-- <div class="opportunity-label"> </div> -->

# Prospective Students

<!-- <p class="opportunity-summary"> -->
Students interested in <strong>undergraduate projects</strong>,
<strong>master's dissertations</strong>, <strong>internships</strong>,
or <strong>future Ph.D. opportunities</strong> are encouraged to contact me by email.
<!-- </p> -->


## Current Openings

::: {.opening-card}

<div class="opening-status">OPEN · M.TECH INTERNSHIP</div>

## Physics-Informed Machine Learning Internship

<!-- <div class="opening-organisation">
ABB Corporate Research Center · Bengaluru
</div> -->

<p class="opening-summary">
Research internship in <strong>physics-informed machine learning for industrial applications</strong>, with a focus on process evolution modelling and soft sensor development using sparse industrial time-series data.
</p>

::: {.opening-details}

<div class="opening-detail">
<span>Duration</span>
<strong>6 months</strong>
<p>Possibility of extension up to one year</p>
</div>

<div class="opening-detail">
<span>Stipend</span>
<strong>₹40,000 / month</strong>
<p>Industry research internship</p>
</div>

<div class="opening-detail">
<span>Location</span>
<strong>Bengaluru</strong>
<!-- <p>ABB Corporate Research Center</p> -->
</div>

<div class="opening-detail">
<span>Eligibility</span>
<strong>M.Tech students</strong>
<p>Students from any discipline may apply</p>
</div>

:::

### Research Focus

<div class="opening-tags">
<span>Physics-Informed Neural Networks</span>
<span>Neural Operators</span>
<span>Machine Learning</span>
<span>Deep Learning</span>
<span>Industrial Time-Series</span>
<span>Soft Sensors</span>
</div>

### Who should contact me?

Students with knowledge of <strong>differential equations</strong> and
<strong>machine learning</strong>, particularly those interested in
<strong>physics-informed machine learning</strong>.

<!-- <div class="opening-note">
The project focuses on process evolution modelling using sparse industrial data, with applications in the cement industry.
</div> -->

<div class="opening-contact">

<strong>Interested</strong>

Send me your <strong>CV</strong> and a short note describing your background in differential equations and machine learning.

<a href="mailto:sivalingam@nitw.ac.in?subject=Interest%20in%20ABB%20Physics-Informed%20ML%20Internship" class="opening-email-button">
Email me about this opportunity →
</a>

</div>

:::

::: {.opportunity-section}
<!--  <div class="opportunity-label"> </div> -->
<!-- ### Email to contain

::: {.application-list}

<div>
<span>01 Curriculum Vitae </span>

<span>02 Academic Transcript </span>

<span>03 Research Interests</span>

<span>04 Programming Experience </span>
</div>

:::

<p class="opportunity-note">
I am always happy to discuss research ideas with motivated students.
</p>

::: -->
::: {.opportunity-section}

<div class="opportunity-label"> </div>

## Areas Available for Student Projects

::: {.student-area-grid}

<div class="student-area">Scientific Machine Learning</div>

<div class="student-area">Physics-Informed Neural Networks</div>

<div class="student-area">Neural Differential Equations</div>

<div class="student-area">Fractional Calculus</div>

<div class="student-area">Dynamical Systems</div>

<div class="student-area">Control Theory</div>

<div class="student-area">Numerical Analysis</div>

<div class="student-area">Scientific Computing</div>

<div class="student-area">Applied Mathematics</div>

:::

:::


::: {.opportunity-section}

<div class="opportunity-label"> </div>

## Research Supervision

::: {.supervision-group}

### Visiting Scholars

<div class="supervision-context">
While at NIT Warangal as Assistant Professor
</div>

::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Indira Priyadharshini</strong>
<span>Ph.D · National Institute of Technology Puducherry</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2025–2026</span>
<strong>Mathematical analysis of optimisation techniques for neural networks</strong>
</div>

:::


::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Thorati Nagadevi</strong>
<span>Ph.D · National Institute of Technology Puducherry</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2025–2026</span>
<strong>Audio Classification</strong>
</div>

:::

:::

::: {.supervision-group}

### M.Sc. Students

<div class="supervision-context">
While at NIT Puducherry as a Ph.D scholar
</div>

::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Twinkle Sanjay Desai</strong>
<span>M.Sc. Mathematics · National Institute of Technology Puducherry</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2023–2024</span>
<strong>Fractional Dynamical Systems</strong>
</div>

:::


::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Rashmi Ranjan Prusty</strong>
<span>M.Sc. Mathematics · National Institute of Technology Puducherry</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2024–2025</span>
<strong>Fractional Dynamical Systems</strong>
</div>

:::

:::


::: {.supervision-group}

### Project Interns

<div class="supervision-context">
While at NIT Puducherry as a Ph.D scholar
</div>

::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Sriram</strong>
<span>M.Sc. Mathematics · SRM University</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2023–2024</span>
<strong>Control Theory</strong>
</div>

:::


::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Meera Ramesh</strong>
<span>M.Sc. Mathematics · Christ University</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2023–2024</span>
<strong>Control Theory</strong>
</div>

:::


::: {.student-record}

<div class="student-record-main">
<strong>Rahma</strong>
<span>M.Sc. Mathematics · Central University of Tamil Nadu</span>
</div>

<div class="student-record-meta">
<span>2024–2025</span>
<strong>Mathematical Modelling</strong>
</div>

:::
